title: tithymalus commutatus
intro: Tithymalus commutatus, also known as Euphorbia commutata, is a species of flowering plant in the spurge family (Euphorbiaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe and protect the skin. The health benefits of Tithymalus commutatus include reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as supporting the immune system and providing relief from pain and fever. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as tinctures, infusions, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
